title: Imposter Hearts
description: Changes Vanilla Hearts With Small Little Imposters
body:
Have you ever wanted The hearts to look a bit sussy? Or just love the Among Us gui resource pack and sad that its not compatible with version 1.21?

Fear not Human, for this resouce pack may interest you!

This small simple resource pack changes changes all the vanilla and modded hearts into little crewmates!

(Remember, the resource pack is not compatible with any resource pack that changes the gui below 1.21)

Few Examples:

NORMAL HEARTS

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f2a8a589c05c07494564b6c5eb34d1702c46b89.png)
